headline: Space Race
description: The Space Race (1955-1975) was Cold War competition between the US and USSR for space dominance. USSR firsts: satellite (Sputnik 1957), human (Gagarin 1961), woman (Tereshkova 1963), spacewalk (Leonov 1965). US firsts: Moon landing (Apollo 11, Armstrong + Aldrin, July 20, 1969). Apollo program employed 400,000 people.
